user.title: Connect a ScorpionTrack share
user.description: Paste a ScorpionTrack shared-location URL or the token from that URL.

data_description.share_token: A full URL such as https://app.scorpiontrack.com/shared/location?token=... or just the token itself.

error.cannot_connect: The ScorpionTrack share could not be reached right now.
error.invalid_token: Your shared-location link is invalid or incomplete.
error.share_unavailable: Your shared-location link is invalid, expired, been revoked, or no longer returns data.

abort.already_configured: This shared location is already configured.
